hypothesis: If we train XGBoost Δ-learning models to predict the correction from GFN1-xTB to DFT band gaps for MOFs using selected ST-135/RAC/APRDF descriptors, then the resulting predictions will achieve lower error versus DFT (PBE/HSE06) than direct-learning and deep-learning baselines because the xTB→DFT residual is smoother and more learnable than the absolute band gap.
